channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anduril's Trae Stephens says defense tech faces a shakeout
item.description: The Anduril co-founder warns that high valuations, too much venture capital, and unrealistic expectations could lead to industry consolidation.

item.title: The contradiction of 'monoculture': a word used to mourn Colbert and describe AI's creative damage
item.description: Algorithms promised variety, but a new AI study finds they produce 'visual elevator music,' contributing to a monoculture problem.

item.title: Sam Altman, Mark Cuban, and Elizabeth Warren are wrong: no apocalypse clause needed in tax code
item.description: AI-specific taxes on tokens and compute, along with billionaire-backed displacement funds, would undermine the tax code's historical resilience.

item.title: Can unions drive the AI economy? AFL-CIO's Liz Shuler believes so
item.description: Also: Full coverage and workplace chatter from Fortune.
